creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 180738
patch to update graphics/qgis from 2.18.2 to 2.18.4

This minor update from QGIS 2.14.2 to 2.18.4 comes with some new features and many bugfixes.


Changes of the port:
- Update to 2.18.4
- New dependency graphics/py-pyproj
- Newer versions of some python dependencies


The patch was tested on Poudriere (10.3i/a, 11.0i/a  and, HEADi/a, with options all enabled, all disabled and default).

portlint -AC seems happy.



It would be nice, if the committer also closes [1], because the described behaviour was never reported again as a problem or show stopper, thanks.

[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=212910
